problem id: 0b26be60
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  01100110 -> 00110011
  00001010 -> 00000101
  01001110 -> 00100111
  01111010 -> 00111101
  01000000 -> 00100000
  11110010 -> 01111001
  00111010 -> 00011101
  01101111 -> 10110111

query: 11101110
predicted answer: 01110111
